name: Overnight
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 2am, then showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 4am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely between 4am and 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 62. South wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
